title: mongodb-memory-server Config Options
permitted_uses: Planning source for binary download/cache configuration, postinstall controls, and local test reproducibility guidance.
claims_supported: The package exposes configuration options for binary download directory and related download behavior.
The package supports environment-variable and package configuration for mongodb-memory-server behavior.
Global and local binary cache paths can be controlled or preferred through configuration.
claims_not_supported: That every developer machine already has a compatible mongod binary cached.
That binary download behavior is acceptable for air-gapped environments without pre-seeding.
